clusters.title: Log path does not match worker log files

member_findings.title: Log path does not match worker log files
member_findings.impact: A worker started through the existing CLI writes logs under its configured log_dir and uses the logger's filename pattern, for example datasystem_worker.INFO.log. Building /opt/yuanrong/datasystem/log/<address>.log therefore makes dscli logs fail with tail ENOENT for the normal/default worker configuration, so the new command cannot print the target worker's logs.
member_findings.fix: Resolve the matched worker's actual log_dir and log_filename from its command line or accepted worker config defaults, normalize the directory the same way start/worker startup do, and tail the current INFO log file pattern instead of an address-derived filename.
